Public LinkedIn result for Oliver Rhode matches British diplomat, FCDO Head of Climate Adaptation Finance, climate finance/geopolitics/policy focus, year out for university, and language background. Climate MOT site confirms the project but does not publish a founder name.

profile_summary.background: Former UK diplomat with deep experience in climate finance and international policy. Transitioning into startup building with a focus on energy systems and climate risk.
experience_highlights: 10 years in UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
Head of Climate Adaptation Finance
Worked across 93 economies via World Bank analysis
Built Climate MOT (live product with traffic)
Currently studying MSc International Finance at Imperial
Languages degree from Trinity College Dublin (French/Italian)

current_obsession.details: Exploring future energy infrastructure and climate adaptation. Interested in carbon capture, biochar, ocean alkalinity, and the geopolitical impact of energy transitions. Focused on identifying where climate risk will hit hardest and how markets respond.

superpower.details: Strong ability to quickly absorb technical topics, synthesize information, and generate ideas. Combines policy depth with action-oriented mindset.

traits: able to explore multiple ideas quickly

items: Transitioned from diplomacy to startup building
Strong curiosity across multiple climate domains
Open to exploring unconventional ideas (e.g. venison carbon impact)

founders.elevator_pitch: Former diplomat with deep climate finance experience, now building products and exploring energy systems. Strong at ideation and rapid learning across complex domains.

extra_facts.fact: Has direct experience shaping international climate finance policy
extra_facts.use_for_conversation: Ask what policies actually move capital in practice

extra_facts.fact: Built a live product (Climate MOT) solo using AI tools
extra_facts.use_for_conversation: Ask what he learned going from policy to building

extra_facts.fact: Currently retooling skillset for commercial world
extra_facts.use_for_conversation: Ask what skills he feels he needs to build next

extra_facts.fact: Strong interest in geopolitical implications of energy systems
extra_facts.use_for_conversation: Discuss how geopolitics shapes markets

extra_facts.fact: Comfortable exploring multiple ideas before committing
extra_facts.use_for_conversation: Ask how he decides what to pursue

conversation_starters: What made you leave policy and start building?
What did you learn from launching Climate MOT?
Where is climate capital actually being deployed effectively?
What’s the biggest misconception about energy systems?
Which climate technologies are underrated right now?

approach: Be open to exploring multiple directions

uncertainties: Climate MOT does not publicly name its founder
LinkedIn profile photo URL is blocked behind LinkedIn/authwall and has not been captured
